summary: Cohorts, bootcamps, and hands-on academy courses — technical, regulatory, and market training designed for science-first founders with focus on lab-readiness, safety, and real-world deployment.

featured.name: Startup School India
featured.description: A national initiative bringing founders together for practical sessions, mentorship, and community-driven growth. Ideal for early-stage teams seeking peer feedback and investor-ready preparation.

offerings.name: Startup Bootcamp Program
offerings.description: Intensive hands-on sprint for early-stage teams covering rapid prototyping, customer validation, demo-day preparation, product development, business development, and lab-readiness.

offerings.name: Bio Entrepreneurship Program (BEP)
offerings.description: Cohort-based program for bio founders blending regulation, lab practices, fundraising readiness, and go-to-market guidance.

offerings.name: Bio Academy
offerings.description: Short modular courses on lab methods, safety, and bioinformatics for founders and researchers.

offerings.name: Bio Informatics
offerings.description: Workshops and practical training on bioinformatics workflows, data analysis, and building web tools for biological data.

offerings.name: Startup School India
offerings.description: Community-led learning and mentoring with session series and peer cohorts connecting founders with mentors.
